## Jansen & Rit (1995): Replication {.smaller}

Replication of all simulation experiments from:

> Jansen, B. H. & Rit, V. G. (1995). *Electroencephalogram and visual evoked potential generation in a mathematical model of coupled cortical columns.* Biological Cybernetics, 73, 357\u2013366.

Using `tvbo` with the `tvboptim` backend, driven entirely by a declarative YAML specification.

## Jansen & Rit (1995): Fig. 3 - C sweep {.smaller}

::::: {.columns}

:::: {.column width="30%"}
**Original**

![](figures/jansen1995/original/fig_03.png)
::::

:::: {.column width="40%"}
**Specification**

```yaml {code-line-numbers="|1-14|15-28|29-42|43-56|57-70|71-84"}
- id: 1
  label: "Single-column spontaneous activity:
          C sweep (Fig. 3)"
  dynamics: &base_dynamics
    name: JansenRit1995
    parameters: &jr_params
      A: {value: 3.25, unit: mV}
      B: {value: 22, unit: mV}
      C: {value: 135}
      a: {value: 100, unit: s^-1}
      b: {value: 50, unit: s^-1}
      v0: {value: 6, unit: mV}
      e0: {value: 2.5, unit: s^-1}
      r: {value: 0.56, unit: mV^-1}
      p:
        value: 220
        unit: s^-1
        shape: "(n_nodes,)"
        distribution: &dist_p_uniform
          name: Uniform
          domain: {lo: 120, hi: 320}
          axis: time
      K:
        value: 0
        heterogeneous: true
        shape: "(n_nodes,)"
    derived_parameters: &jr_derived
      C1: {equation: {rhs: C}}
      C2: {equation: {rhs: 0.8*C}}
      C3: {equation: {rhs: 0.25*C}}
      C4: {equation: {rhs: 0.25*C}}
    functions: &jr_functions
      Sigm:
        arguments: [v]
        equation:
          rhs: 2*e0 / (1 + exp(r*(v0 - v)))
    coupling_terms: &jr_coupling
      c_intercolumn: {}
    state_variables:
      y0:
        equation: {rhs: y3}
        unit: mV
      y3:
        equation:
          rhs: >-
            A*a*Sigm(y1 - y2)
            - 2*a*y3 - a**2*y0
        unit: mV/s
      y1:
        equation: {rhs: y4}
        unit: mV
      y4:
        equation:
          rhs: >-
            A*a*(p + C2*Sigm(C1*y0)
            + K*c_intercolumn)
            - 2*a*y4 - a**2*y1
        unit: mV/s
        coupling_variable: true
      y2:
        equation: {rhs: y5}
        unit: mV
      y5:
        equation:
          rhs: >-
            B*b*(C4*Sigm(C3*y0))
            - 2*b*y5 - b**2*y2
        unit: mV/s
    derived_variables:
      v_pyr:
        equation: {rhs: y1 - y2}
        unit: mV
    output: [v_pyr]
  integration: &integration_2s
    method: RungeKutta4thOrder
    duration: 2.0
    step_size: 0.002
    transient_time: 0.5
  explorations:
    C_sweep_fig3:
      parameters:
        C:
          explored_values:
            [68, 128, 135, 270, 675, 1350]
```
::::

:::: {.column width="30%"}
**Reproduced**

![](figures/jansen1995/reproduced/Jansen1995_Fig3.png)
::::

:::::


## Jansen & Rit (1995): Fig. 4 - 4D parameter space {.smaller}

::::: {.columns}

:::: {.column width="30%"}
**Original**

![](figures/jansen1995/original/fig_04.png)
::::

:::: {.column width="40%"}
**Specification**

```yaml {code-line-numbers="|1-7|8-14|15-21"}
- id: 2
  label: "4D parameter space exploration
          (Fig. 4)"
  dynamics: *base_dynamics
  integration: *integration_2s
  explorations:
    param_space_4D_fig4:
      mode: product
      parameters:
        A:
          unit: mV
          domain: {lo: 2.6, hi: 9.75, n: 50}
        B:
          unit: mV
          domain: {lo: 17.6, hi: 110, n: 50}
        C:
          explored_values:
            [108, 135, 143, 405, 675]
        v0:
          unit: mV
          explored_values: [3.12, 5.52, 6.0]
```
::::

:::: {.column width="30%"}
**Reproduced**

![](figures/jansen1995/reproduced/Jansen1995_Fig4.png)
::::

:::::


## Jansen & Rit (1995): Fig. 5 - Symmetric K sweep {.smaller}

::::: {.columns}

:::: {.column width="30%"}
**Original**

![](figures/jansen1995/original/fig_05.png)
::::

:::: {.column width="40%"}
**Specification**

```yaml {code-line-numbers="|1-11|12-22|23-33|34-45"}
- id: 3
  label: "Double column (identical), zero
          delay: K1xK2 sweep (Fig. 5)"
  dynamics: *base_dynamics
  network:
    number_of_nodes: 2
    conduction_speed: {value: 0}
    nodes:
      - {id: 0}
      - {id: 1}
    edges:
      - source: 0
        target: 1
        parameters:
          weight: {value: 1}
      - source: 1
        target: 0
        parameters:
          weight: {value: 1}
    coupling:
      c_intercolumn:
        delayed: false
        parameters:
          e0: {value: 2.5}
          r: {value: 0.56}
          v0: {value: 6.0}
        incoming_states: [y1, y2]
        pre_expression:
          lhs: pre
          rhs: >-
            2*e0 / (1 + exp(r
            *(v0 - (y1 - y2))))
        post_expression:
          lhs: c_intercolumn
          rhs: gx
  integration: *integration_2s
  explorations:
    K_sweep_symmetric_fig5:
      mode: product
      parameters:
        K:
          domain:
            lo: 0
            hi: 120
            step: 10
```
::::

:::: {.column width="30%"}
**Reproduced**

![](figures/jansen1995/reproduced/Jansen1995_Fig5.png)
::::

:::::


## Jansen & Rit (1995): Fig. 6 - Asymmetric K sweep {.smaller}

::::: {.columns}

:::: {.column width="30%"}
**Original**

![](figures/jansen1995/original/fig_06.png)
::::

:::: {.column width="40%"}
**Specification**

```yaml {code-line-numbers="|1-20|21-40|41-60|61-80|81-100|101-119"}
- id: 4
  label: "Double column (different), delayed:
          K1xK2 sweep (Fig. 6)"
  dynamics: &delayed_dynamics
    name: JansenRit1995_Delayed
    derived_from_model: JansenRit1995
    modified: true
    parameters:
      A: {value: 3.25, unit: mV}
      B: {value: 22, unit: mV}
      C: {value: 135}
      a: {value: 100, unit: s^-1}
      b: {value: 50, unit: s^-1}
      v0: {value: 6, unit: mV}
      e0: {value: 2.5, unit: s^-1}
      r: {value: 0.56, unit: mV^-1}
      p:
        value: 220
        unit: s^-1
        shape: "(n_nodes,)"
        distribution: *dist_p_uniform
      a_d: {value: 30, unit: s^-1}
      K: {value: 0, shape: "(n_nodes,)"}
    derived_parameters: *jr_derived
    functions: *jr_functions
    coupling_terms: *jr_coupling
    state_variables:
      y0:
        equation: {rhs: y3}
        unit: mV
      y3:
        equation:
          rhs: >-
            A*a*Sigm(y1 - y2)
            - 2*a*y3 - a**2*y0
        unit: mV/s
      y1:
        equation: {rhs: y4}
        unit: mV
      y4:
        equation:
          rhs: >-
            A*a*(p + C2*Sigm(C1*y0)
            + z0) - 2*a*y4 - a**2*y1
        unit: mV/s
      y2:
        equation: {rhs: y5}
        unit: mV
      y5:
        equation:
          rhs: >-
            B*b*(C4*Sigm(C3*y0))
            - 2*b*y5 - b**2*y2
        unit: mV/s
      z0:
        equation: {rhs: z1}
        unit: mV
      z1:
        equation:
          rhs: >-
            A*a_d*K*c_intercolumn
            - 2*a_d*z1 - a_d**2*z0
        unit: mV/s
    derived_variables:
      v_pyr:
        equation: {rhs: y1 - y2}
        unit: mV
    output: [v_pyr]
  network:
    number_of_regions: 2
    number_of_nodes: 2
    conduction_speed: {value: 1.0}
    nodes:
      - {id: 0}
      - id: 1
        parameters:
          B: {value: 17.6}
          C: {value: 108}
    edges:
      - source: 0
        target: 1
        directed: true
      - source: 1
        target: 0
        directed: true
    coupling: &sigmoidal_coupling
      c_intercolumn:
        parameters:
          e0: {value: 2.5}
          r: {value: 0.56}
          v0: {value: 6.0}
        incoming_states: [y1, y2]
        pre_expression:
          lhs: pre
          rhs: >-
            2*e0 / (1 + exp(r
            *(v0 - (y1 - y2))))
        post_expression:
          lhs: c_intercolumn
          rhs: gx
  integration: *integration_2s
  explorations:
    K_sweep_asymmetric_fig6:
      mode: product
      parameters:
        K:
          domain:
            lo: 0
            hi: 8000
            n: 100
          element_domains:
            - element: 0
              lo: 0
              hi: 1500
              n: 100
            - element: 1
              lo: 0
              hi: 8000
              n: 100
```
::::

:::: {.column width="30%"}
**Reproduced**

![](figures/jansen1995/reproduced/Jansen1995_Fig6.png)
::::

:::::



## Jansen & Rit (1995): Fig. 8 - VEP symmetric, averaged {.smaller}

::::: {.columns}

:::: {.column width="30%"}
**Original**

![](figures/jansen1995/original/fig_08.png)
::::

:::: {.column width="40%"}
**Specification**

```yaml {code-line-numbers="|1-18|19-36|37-54|55-72|73-88"}
- id: 5
  label: "VEP: identical columns, no delay
          (Figs. 8-10)"
  dynamics: &vep_dynamics
    name: JansenRit1995_VEP
    parameters: *jr_params
    derived_parameters: *jr_derived
    functions: *jr_functions
    coupling_terms: *jr_coupling
    state_variables:
      y0: {equation: {rhs: y3}}
      y3:
        equation:
          rhs: >-
            A*a*Sigm(y1 - y2)
            - 2*a*y3 - a**2*y0
      y1: {equation: {rhs: y4}}
      y4:
        equation:
          rhs: >-
            A*a*(p + P
            + C2*Sigm(C1*y0)
            + K*c_intercolumn)
            - 2*a*y4 - a**2*y1
      y2: {equation: {rhs: y5}}
      y5:
        equation:
          rhs: >-
            B*b*(C4*Sigm(C3*y0))
            - 2*b*y5 - b**2*y2
    derived_variables:
      v_pyr: {equation: {rhs: y1 - y2}}
    output: [v_pyr]
  network:
    number_of_nodes: 2
    conduction_speed: {value: 0}
    nodes:
      - {id: 0}
      - {id: 1}
    edges:
      - {source: 0, target: 1}
      - {source: 1, target: 0}
    coupling:
      c_intercolumn:
        parameters:
          e0: {value: 2.5}
          r: {value: 0.56}
          v0: {value: 6}
        incoming_states: [y1, y2]
        pre_expression:
          lhs: pre
          rhs: >-
            2*e0 / (1 + exp(r
            *(v0 - (y1 - y2))))
        post_expression:
          lhs: c_intercolumn
          rhs: gx
  events: &flash_events
    P:
      event_type: stimulus
      equation:
        rhs: >-
          Piecewise((q*((t - t0)/w)**n
          *exp(-(t - t0)/w), t >= t0),
          (0, True))
      parameters:
        n: {value: 7}
        w: {value: 0.005, unit: s}
        q: {value: 0.5}
        t0: {value: 0.5, unit: s}
      regions: [0]
      weighting: [1.0]
  integration: &integration_vep
    method: RungeKutta4thOrder
    duration: 1.5
    step_size: 0.002
    transient_time: 6.0
  execution:
    random_seed: 42
  explorations:
    VEP_symmetric_K_fig8:
      mode: zip
      n_trials: 20
      average: trials
      parameters:
        K:
          explored_values:
            [1, 10, 70, 120]
```
::::

:::: {.column width="30%"}
**Reproduced**

![](figures/jansen1995/reproduced/Jansen1995_Fig8.png)
::::

:::::


## Jansen & Rit (1995): Fig. 9 - VEP asymmetric, averaged {.smaller}

::::: {.columns}

:::: {.column width="30%"}
**Original**

![](figures/jansen1995/original/fig_09.png)
::::

:::: {.column width="40%"}
**Specification**

```yaml {code-line-numbers="|1-4|5-8|9-12"}
explorations:
  VEP_asymmetric_K_fig9:
    mode: zip
    n_trials: 20
    average: trials
    parameters:
      K:
        element_domains:
          - element: 0
            explored_values: [10, 40]
          - element: 1
            explored_values: [120, 200]
```
::::

:::: {.column width="30%"}
**Reproduced**

![](figures/jansen1995/reproduced/Jansen1995_Fig9.png)
::::

:::::


## Jansen & Rit (1995): Fig. 10 - VEP single trials {.smaller}

::::: {.columns}

:::: {.column width="30%"}
**Original**

![](figures/jansen1995/original/fig_10.png)
::::

:::: {.column width="40%"}
**Specification**

```yaml {code-line-numbers="|1-4|5-8|9-11"}
explorations:
  VEP_single_trials_fig10:
    mode: zip
    n_trials: 5
    parameters:
      K:
        element_domains:
          - element: 0
            explored_values: [10]
          - element: 1
            explored_values: [120]
```
::::

:::: {.column width="30%"}
**Reproduced**

![](figures/jansen1995/reproduced/Jansen1995_Fig10.png)
::::

:::::


## Jansen & Rit (1995): Fig. 11 - VEP delayed columns {.smaller}

::::: {.columns}

:::: {.column width="30%"}
**Original**

![](figures/jansen1995/original/fig_11.png)
::::

:::: {.column width="40%"}
**Specification**

```yaml {code-line-numbers="|1-18|19-36|37-54|55-72|73-87"}
- id: 6
  label: "VEP: different columns, with delay
          (Fig. 11)"
  dynamics:
    name: JansenRit1995_Delayed_VEP
    parameters:
      A: {value: 3.25, unit: mV}
      B: {value: 22, unit: mV}
      C: {value: 135}
      a: {value: 100, unit: s^-1}
      b: {value: 50, unit: s^-1}
      v0: {value: 6, unit: mV}
      e0: {value: 2.5, unit: s^-1}
      r: {value: 0.56, unit: mV^-1}
      p:
        value: 220
        unit: s^-1
        shape: "(n_nodes,)"
        distribution: *dist_p_uniform
      a_d: {value: 30, unit: s^-1}
      K: {value: 0, shape: "(n_nodes,)"}
    derived_parameters: *jr_derived
    functions: *jr_functions
    coupling_terms: *jr_coupling
    state_variables:
      y0: {equation: {rhs: y3}}
      y3:
        equation:
          rhs: >-
            A*a*Sigm(y1 - y2)
            - 2*a*y3 - a**2*y0
      y1: {equation: {rhs: y4}}
      y4:
        equation:
          rhs: >-
            A*a*(p + P
            + C2*Sigm(C1*y0) + z0)
            - 2*a*y4 - a**2*y1
      y2: {equation: {rhs: y5}}
      y5:
        equation:
          rhs: >-
            B*b*(C4*Sigm(C3*y0))
            - 2*b*y5 - b**2*y2
      z0: {equation: {rhs: z1}}
      z1:
        equation:
          rhs: >-
            A*a_d*K*c_intercolumn
            - 2*a_d*z1 - a_d**2*z0
    derived_variables:
      v_pyr: {equation: {rhs: y1 - y2}}
    output: [v_pyr]
  network:
    number_of_regions: 2
    number_of_nodes: 2
    conduction_speed: {value: 0}
    nodes:
      - {id: 0}
      - id: 1
        parameters:
          B: {value: 17.6}
          C: {value: 108}
    edges:
      - source: 0
        target: 1
        directed: true
      - source: 1
        target: 0
        directed: true
    coupling: *sigmoidal_coupling
  events: *flash_events
  integration: *integration_vep
  execution:
    random_seed: 42
  explorations:
    VEP_delayed_fig11:
      mode: zip
      n_trials: 40
      average: trials
      parameters:
        K:
          element_domains:
            - element: 0
              explored_values: [300, 100]
            - element: 1
              explored_values: [1000, 4000]
```
::::

:::: {.column width="30%"}
**Reproduced**

![](figures/jansen1995/reproduced/Jansen1995_Fig11.png)
::::

:::::
